allow:
Bash(python -c "
import sys
sys.argv = ['test']
# Test imports and basic structure
from ui import Ui_MainWindow, PanelPreviewWidget, PANEL_LAYOUTS
print\('ui.py imports OK'\)

import main
print\('main.py imports OK'\)
print\('PRESETS:', list\(main.PRESETS.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('PRESET_ORDER:', main.PRESET_ORDER\)
print\('DEFAULT_PROFILES keys:', list\(main.DEFAULT_PROFILES.keys\(\)\)\)

# Test SVG generation
class MockApp\(main.TaskPanelApp.__bases__[0]\):
    def __init__\(self\): pass
app_mock = object.__new__\(main.TaskPanelApp\)
app_mock.panel_color = '#1e1e2e'
app_mock.panel_opacity = 90
svg = main.TaskPanelApp.generate_panel_svg\(app_mock, '#1e1e2e', 0.9\)
assert 'floating-center' in svg
assert 'hint-stretch-borders' in svg
print\('SVG generation OK, length:', len\(svg\)\)

# Test PanelPreviewWidget configs
for pid in main.PRESET_ORDER:
    assert pid in PANEL_LAYOUTS, f'Missing PANEL_LAYOUT for {pid}'
print\('All preset layouts present OK'\)
" 2>&1)

[General]
ColorScheme=Breeze Light

[Colors:Window]
ForegroundNormal=35,38,41
BackgroundNormal=239,240,241

[Colors:View]
ForegroundNormal=35,38,41
BackgroundNormal=252,252,252

[Colors:Button]
ForegroundNormal=35,38,41
BackgroundNormal=239,240,241

[Colors:Tooltip]
ForegroundNormal=35,38,41
BackgroundNormal=239,240,241

[Colors:Complementary]
ForegroundNormal=252,252,252
BackgroundNormal=42,46,50
EOF
echo "Updated. Contents:"
cat ~/.local/share/plasma/desktoptheme/EquestriaPanel/colors)

Bash(qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /org/kde/KWin/ColorCorrect org.kde.kwin.ColorCorrect.night 2>/dev/null || echo "no kwin color api"
qdbus6 org.kde.plasmashell /PlasmaShell org.kde.PlasmaShell.evaluateScript "var s=''; var t=desktopTheme\(\); print\(JSON.stringify\(t\)\);" 2>/dev/null | head -5)

Bash(kreadconfig6 --file plasmarc --group Theme --key name
kreadconfig6 --file kdeglobals --group General --key ColorScheme
kreadconfig6 --file kdeglobals --group "Colors:Complementary" --key BackgroundNormal
kreadconfig6 --file kdeglobals --group "Colors:Complementary" --key ForegroundNormal)
